bugs.error_message: Multiple top-level packages discovered in a flat-layout: ['app', 'packaging']. Setuptools will not proceed with this build.
bugs.root_cause: setuptools auto-discovery picked up 'packaging' directory as a top-level package alongside 'app'
bugs.fix: Added [tool.setuptools] packages = ['app'] to explicitly specify only 'app' should be included

bugs.error_message: ERROR: Could not find qmake, please install or provide path using $QMAKE in linuxdeploy-plugin-qt
bugs.root_cause: Qt plugin requested for AppImage build, but PySide6 is pure Python and doesn't use qmake
bugs.fix: Removed '--plugin qt' from linuxdeploy command and removed download of linuxdeploy-plugin-qt

bugs.error_message: mv: cannot stat 'procedures-visualizer*.AppImage': No such file or directory
bugs.root_cause: appimagetool generates filename from desktop file Name= field (Procedures_Visualizer-x86_64.AppImage), workflow expected lowercase with dash (procedures-visualizer*.AppImage)
bugs.fix: Rename Procedures_Visualizer-x86_64.AppImage to procedures-visualizer-x86_64.AppImage after creation
